# docubot-test
Sandbox for DocuBot testing


## Recent Updates (Auto-generated)
✨ New

*   You can now easily format `Date` objects into `YYYY-MM-DD` strings.
    ```javascript
    import { formatDate } from './utils'; // Adjust import path as needed

    const myDate = new Date('2023-01-15T10:30:00Z');
    const formattedString = formatDate(myDate);
    // formattedString will be "2023-01-15"
    ```
